threats.title: Fake webhook requests
threats.mitigation: Verify webhook signatures and use secret tokens.

threats.title: Webhook payload manipulation
threats.description: Payloads could be modified before processing.
threats.mitigation: Use HTTPS and verify request origin.

threats.title: Public bucket exposure
threats.description: Improper configuration exposes stored objects publicly.
threats.mitigation: Restrict access using IAM policies and private bucket settings.

threats.title: Unauthorized object modification
threats.description: Attacker modifies stored files in object storage.
threats.mitigation: Enable versioning, integrity checks and strict IAM roles.

threats.title: SQL Injection
threats.description: Malicious SQL queries alter or extract database data.
threats.mitigation: Use prepared statements, ORM and strict input validation.

threats.title: Database data leakage
threats.description: Unauthorized access to sensitive data stored in database.
threats.mitigation: Use network isolation, encryption and strong authentication.

threats.title: Session hijacking via stolen cookies
threats.description: Attacker steals user session cookies and impersonates a user.
threats.mitigation: Use Secure and HttpOnly cookies, SameSite policy, and implement MFA.

threats.title: Cross-Site Scripting (XSS)
threats.description: Malicious script injected into frontend leading to token theft or actions on behalf of user.
threats.mitigation: Use output encoding, CSP headers, and sanitize all user inputs.

threats.title: Unauthorized API access
threats.description: Attacker sends requests directly to API without proper authentication.
threats.mitigation: Use JWT/OAuth2 authentication and enforce token validation.

threats.title: API flooding
threats.description: Attacker sends excessive requests causing service degradation.
threats.mitigation: Implement rate limiting, API gateway, and throttling.

threats.title: Authentication token forgery
threats.description: Attacker attempts to forge authentication tokens.
threats.mitigation: Sign tokens with strong keys and validate signatures.

threats.title: Privilege escalation
threats.description: Attacker exploits backend logic to gain higher privileges.
threats.mitigation: Apply RBAC, validate permissions server-side and follow least privilege.

threats.title: Sensitive information exposure
threats.description: Error messages or logs may leak internal system information.
threats.mitigation: Use secure error handling and avoid exposing stack traces.
